steps.t: Haudh Eglan lies north of a cliff called Amlaith's Scar, which likewise lies west of Ost Lagoros in Annúndir. You should defeat Wargs and search Haudh…
Orthonn can be found at Ost Lagoros, bordering the eastern edge of Annúndir (across the river). You should bring news of Haudh Eglan to Orthonn.
